seoTitle: Palm Cove vs Palm Island — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Palm Cove and Palm Island. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Palm Cove vs Palm Island: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Palm Cove and Palm Island.
heading: Palm Cove vs Palm Island — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Palm Cove, Queensland and Palm Island, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Palm Cove has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Palm Island (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Palm Cove or Palm Island safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Palm Cove has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Palm Island scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Palm Cove scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Palm Island scores 43/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Palm Cove or Palm Island?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Palm Cove has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.47% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
